summary: Independent QA R4 accepts RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 at commit 45b9a4391096969eed0d67891f6710be48d2c30b. The two latest reviewer-registration commits are allowed process records and do not alter R0 semantics.

decisions.decision: Accept RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 for lead integration after R2/R4 review at commit 45b9a4391096969eed0d67891f6710be48d2c30b.

The prior QA findings are fixed: parsed goal-mode and model-routing canonical current state now point to R0 / RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 / REVIEW, and RR0 task JSON formatting is reproducible under Prettier.
The reviewer-registration updates after the R2 semantic fix are confined to allowed process/task-registry paths and do not change R0 roadmap semantics.

risks.summary: Historical M0-M7 ledger text remains intentionally preserved; acceptance is based on canonical current state and explicit R0 snapshot markers, not removal of history.

requested_action: Lead orchestrator may integrate/close RR0-ROADMAP-ADOPTION-001 and choose the next dependency-ready R0 task without starting R1 implementation work.
